mapper.select: SELECT id AS accountId, account_name AS accountName, maturity_date AS maturityDate, balance AS principalAmount, interest_rate AS interestRate, DATEDIFF(maturity_date, CURDATE()) AS daysUntilMaturity FROM linked_bank_accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_dormant = FALSE AND account_type IN ('SAVINGS', 'DEPOSIT') AND maturity_date IS NOT NULL AND interest_rate IS NOT NULL AND maturity_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ORDER BY maturity_date ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT ds.stock_code AS stockCode, ds.stock_name AS stockName, ds.category, ds.dividend_yield AS dividendYield, ds.tags, se.event_date AS exDividendDate FROM dividend_stocks ds LEFT JOIN ( SELECT stock_code, MIN(event_date) AS event_date FROM stock_events WHERE event_type = 'DIVIDEND' AND event_date >= CURDATE() GROUP BY stock_code ) se ON ds.stock_code = se.stock_code WHERE ds.is_active = TRUE AND ds.dividend_yield > #{interestRatePct} ORDER BY ds.dividend_yield DESC LIMIT 10
